name: AWS SageMaker Unauthorized Presigned Domain URL Creation Detected
description: Unauthorized presigned domain URL creation in Amazon SageMaker grants temporary access to domain resources, potentially bypassing access controls. Such activity could expose sensitive data or systems to unauthorized users, posing significant security risks to AI infrastructure. Detecting this behavior is essential to prevent exploitation and safeguard machine learning environments.

rules.name: AWS SageMaker Unauthorized Presigned Domain URL Creation Detected

author: Sunil Bharti
